settings.heading: What are Infinity women's scrubs?
settings.content: Cherokee Infinity women's scrubs are Cherokee's performance workwear line — built for healthcare professionals who lead with energy, confidence, and style. Infinity sets a new standard in performance workwear, seamlessly blending athletic designs with professional style so your women’s scrubs can keep up with everything your shift demands. The fabric combines breathable, moisture-wicking stretch poplin and flexible knit panels, with PROTX2® technology built in to control odors through long shifts.

settings.heading: What fabric and technology is used in Infinity women's scrubs?
settings.content: Infinity women's scrubs are built with breathable, moisture-wicking stretch poplin that keeps you cool and dry through long shifts. Flexible knit panels are incorporated into select styles for extra range of motion and comfort exactly where you need it. PROTX2® technology is built into the fabric to fight odors throughout the day, keeping you fresh from the first patient to the last.

settings.heading: How do Infinity women's scrubs fit?
settings.content: Infinity scrubs are cut in athletic-inspired silhouettes designed to move with you. Pants range from elastic waistband and drawstring jogger cuts for a relaxed, active fit to tapered leg and high-rise skinny options for a sleeker silhouette. Tops include tuck-in styles cut short to stay neatly tucked through a full shift, and relaxed mock wrap and round neck cuts for all-day ease. The mixed-media construction — stretch poplin body with knit panels — means you get structure and stretch in the right places without sacrificing a professional look.

settings.heading: How many pockets do Infinity women's scrubs have?
settings.content: Pocket count varies by style. Tops are available in 2-pocket, 3-pocket, and 4-pocket options depending on the cut. For pants, jogger styles are available with up to 6 pockets — the highest pocket count in the women's Infinity line. For professionals who need maximum on-shift storage, the 6-pocket jogger is the standout option.

settings.heading: Who are Cherokee Infinity women's scrubs designed for?
settings.content: Designed for healthcare professionals who lead with energy, confidence, and style — nurses, LPNs, RNs, medical assistants, CNAs, and other clinical professionals who spend long shifts in hospitals, clinics, and outpatient settings. Infinity is the right fit for professionals who want scrubs that perform at a high level and still look sharp — athletic enough to move freely through fast-paced patient care, polished enough to look professional on the floor. If your scrubs need to keep up with you from the first patient to the last, Infinity was built for that shift.
